clauses.text: Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from any claims arising out of such party's breach of this Agreement or negligence in performing its obligations hereunder.
clauses.difficulty_note: Indemnification is broad and may need limitation

clauses.text: The term of this Agreement shall be five years from the Effective Date and shall automatically renew for successive one-year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least ninety days prior to the end of the then-current term.
clauses.difficulty_note: Auto-renewal could lock parties in indefinitely

clauses.text: Neither party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of this Agreement, regardless of the theory of liability.

All intellectual property developed jointly by the parties under this Agreement shall be jointly owned by both parties, with each party having the right to use such intellectual property without accounting to the other.
Each party represents and warrants that it has full power and authority to enter into this Agreement and perform its obligations hereunder.
clauses.difficulty_note: Should specify what power and authority means

clauses.text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Illinois, without regard to conflict of law principles.
